strategies.name: Use the Answer Choices
strategies.default_hint: Try working backwards. Plug each answer choice into the problem and see which one fits.
strategies.best_for: Multiple choice items where testing options is faster than solving directly.

strategies.name: Plug In Numbers
strategies.default_hint: If a variable feels abstract, substitute a simple number to see how the relationship behaves.
strategies.best_for: Items with variables in the answer choices or abstract expressions.

strategies.name: Estimate Before Solving
strategies.default_hint: Make a rough estimate of the answer first. It helps you spot choices that don't make sense.
strategies.best_for: Computation-heavy items where the answer choices are spread apart.

strategies.name: Draw It Out
strategies.default_hint: Sketch the situation. A quick drawing often makes the relationships clearer.
strategies.best_for: Geometry items, word problems with spatial or physical setups.

strategies.name: Eliminate Wrong Answers
strategies.default_hint: Rule out answers you know are wrong first. Even removing one or two improves your odds.
strategies.best_for: Items where some distractors are clearly implausible.

strategies.name: Find the Key Information
strategies.default_hint: Underline what the question is actually asking. Separate the important numbers from the extra details.
strategies.best_for: Multi-step word problems with distracting or excess information.
